action.reasoning: Observation: Plateauing at 0.58 with MLP. ptend_q is bottleneck (0.31). Analysis: Need vertical-structure-aware architecture. Build a model that reshapes inputs as [60 levels, channels] and uses a 1D CNN or transformer along levels. This should better capture the vertical physics (convection, radiation transfer). Decision: implement a 1D conv/transformer encoder over vertical levels, with scalar features broadcast to all levels.
